summary: A Fox News panel-show segment (chyron: 'Illinois Governor Pritzker blames Trump while addressing 18-year-old student's murder') in which a commentator recites 'liberal policy failures' and shows photos of victims (Rachel Morin, Jocelyn Nungaray, etc.). Despite the tweet's memorial framing of the four women's names, the video itself is a cable-news talking-head clip, not a produced montage.
notable_text: FOX NEWS 'BREAKING NEWS'; 'ILLINOIS GOVERNOR PRITZKER BLAMES TRUMP WHILE ADDRESSING 18-YEAR-OLD STUDENT'S MURDER'; tweet: 'Laken Riley. Rachel Morin. Jocelyn Nungaray. Sheridan Gorman.'
